perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins at night in a crowded outdoor area with Taipei 101 in the background. A young woman in a grey hoodie faces the camera, smiling and gesturing with a peace sign while the building's LED displays show a countdown. (2) As the countdown ends, bright fireworks begin to explode from the various levels of the Taipei 101 tower, lighting up the sky with red and white bursts. The camera pans and tilts to capture the scale of the tower and the crowd holding up phones. (3) A shot features three young women smiling and cheering toward the camera with the tower in the background. (4) The final sequences focus entirely on the skyscraper, showing elaborate multi-colored fireworks (pink, green, white) erupting amidst thick smoke, with the camera zoomed in to capture the architectural details of the bursts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, synchronized countdown from a massive crowd in Chinese, ending with a collective roar. (2) Intense, booming sound effects of fireworks exploding dominate the soundscape, accompanied by the high-pitched cheers and 'wooh' sounds from nearby people. (3) Three female voices are heard shouting 'Happy New Year!' in English with an excited, high-pitched tone. (4) The soundscape concludes with continuous, crackling firework explosions and a rushing wind-like noise, with faint background chatter still audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Better Together' and 'TAIWAN' appear on the building's LED screen, conveying a celebratory and national message. (2) Decorative Text: Yellow and red food stall signs like '熱狗' (Hot Dog) and '炸雞' (Fried Chicken) are visible, providing a festive night-market atmosphere. (3) Functional Text: A digital countdown on the building's facade shows the transition to the new year.

(3) Visual effects such as falling red envelopes, gold coins, and large 'red envelope' graphics are layered over the footage as the women gather their winnings and celebrate together in the final frame.

Three female voices speak enthusiastically, explaining the rules of a New Year's game. (2) Sounds of the sticky toys slapping the table surface are synchronized with the visual action, accompanied by 'ding' sound effects for success and comical 'boing' or buzzer sounds for failure. (3) The audio concludes with a crescendo of the music, loud cheers, and the sound of many coins clinking together as they celebrate their 'winnings.'

(3) '媽媽第一位' (Mom is first), '姊姊失敗' (Sister failed), '哇 媽媽太強了吧' (Wow, Mom is too strong) - Descriptive captions identifying players and their performance. (4) '今年的戰績' (This year's score) - Final tally of winnings shown with a triumphant tone.

(3) The cat leans in extremely close, sniffing the cockroach's body, appearing as if it's about to 'kiss' it. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder furry sweater and black denim shorts, dances on a city street at night with yellow ginkgo leaves on the ground. (2) Transition to the woman sitting on a white bed in a brightly lit indoor room, holding a grey smartphone and speaking directly to the camera with cheerful expressions. (3) Digital overlays show a phone interface with 'Nano Banana' text; an AI-generated image appears showing the woman in a black halter dress on a red carpet. (4) Another interface for 'Veo3' appears, showing a generated video of the woman in the same black dress walking on a red carpet and waving to a crowd of photographers. (5) A flat lay of clothing items (white sweater, black top, blue jeans) on a bed is shown with a digital scanning box moving over them. (6) The woman appears in a final outfit (white sweater, blue jeans, white boots) standing on a modern spiral staircase, posing for the camera. (7) Returns to the woman on the bed, smiling and gesturing while talking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music starts with repetitive vocal chops ('e-a-e-a') and a strong rhythmic beat. (2) A young woman's voice enters, speaking Mandarin in a high-pitched, enthusiastic, and friendly tone. (3) The background music continues at a lower volume as the woman narrates her experience. (4) A synthetic male voice (AI assistant) speaks briefly in a calm, helpful tone. (5) Occasional UI sound effects (dings and camera shutters) punctuate the transitions. (6) The music remains consistent until the end where it fades out with a final brand chime.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '使用 Galaxy S25 Ultra 拍攝' (Shot with Galaxy S25 Ultra) appearing at the top right. (2) Hook Text: '當你一個人在韓國跳舞' (When you are dancing in Korea alone) in white bold letters. (3) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (4) Technical Labels: 'Nano Banana', 'Veo3', and 'Gemini Live' identifying specific AI features. (5) Hook Text: '我也想要體驗一下走紅毯是什麼感覺' (I also want to experience what it feels like to walk the red carpet). (6) Decorative Text: '有過沒？' (Have you?) and 'SAMSUNG' logo at the very end.

(4) Shots of the group traveling in a modern transport van, walking on glaciers with crampons, and riding in an off-road Jeep through icy water are shown in rapid succession. (5) The video concludes with the group throwing snow in the air at night under the aurora, smiling and celebrating their journey.

(3) Ambient sounds of a car engine running and water splashing are heard during the driving and off-road sequences. (4) The music remains constant until the end, where it fades out with a final enthusiastic call to action from the narrator.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a young woman wearing a straw hat and white dress, smiling while holding a capybara wearing a festive scarf. (2) A hand holds up an admission ticket for 'SRI AYUTHAYA LION PARK' labeled 'Adult 300B'. (3) The woman is seen standing on the roof of a zebra-striped jeep surrounded by several tall giraffes. (4) She sits in front of a rocky waterfall holding the capybara, then transitions to a shot of her crouching near a large tiger lying on the ground. (5) Multiple squirrel monkeys climb onto her head and shoulders while she sits on a wooden bench. (6) She stands by a fence looking down at a large enclosure filled with dozens of crocodiles. (7) Quick cuts follow of her interacting with monkeys again, smiling widely, and a final close-up of a monkey's face looking directly into the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins. A high-pitched, energetic female voice starts narrating in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The narration continues with an excited tone, detailing the costs of various animal experiences as indicated by the text overlays. (3) Subtle sound effects of 'ka-ching' or cash register sounds are heard when prices are mentioned. Background ambient noise of the zoo (wind, distant animal sounds) is minimal. (4) The music remains constant in energy until the end, where the narrator gives a concluding enthusiastic statement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '曼谷必去的動物園' (Must-go zoo in Bangkok) appears at the start. (2) Functional Text: '門票 300元' (Ticket 300), '餵長頸鹿 1,200元' (Feeding giraffes 1,200), '抱水豚拍照 300元' (Capybara photo 300), '和老虎拍照 1,000元' (Tiger photo 1,000), '和猴子玩 300元' (Playing with monkeys 300) appear sequentially to list prices. (3) Summary Hook: '竟然要花到 4,000元' (Surprisingly spent 4,000). (4) Emotional Closing: '這趟動物園實在太好玩了' (This zoo trip was really fun) and '下次還想要再來' (Want to come again next time).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Experience List with Prices -> Emotional Conclusion
